title: DF-44 Reference Body Refreshable Pipeline (P1)
completion_report: P1: DF-44 reference body refreshable pipeline core. 7 implement commits + 2 fix-wave commits; QC tri-review (3/3 Approve after re-review). Capability nexus.reference.refresh registered in orchestration CapabilityRegistry + host_tool_registry (P3 fix); daemon-side refresh_scheduler periodic task; new Draft spec reference-knowledge.md (7 sections); DB migration 202606220003 adds reference_sources refresh-tracking columns + partial indexes; per-ID test vectors ≥ 1 success + ≥ 1 failure. Fix-wave added validate_reference_url (HTTPS-only + private-IP block) and streaming body fetch with incremental blake3 + 100 MiB cap.
